properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V3 C2 V4 C2 V5 C6 C7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I am resting on the finished work Of Jesus Christ today All circumstances will be gone, The Word of God will still remain! No sickness, fear, no guilt or sin Can have control and worry me, The keys of faith are in my hands, And I am bound for victory!

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I am free, my new day has come Now I can be who I truly am I am free, covered by His blood! All things are possible with God All things are possible with God

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: A great commission from my Lord I have now received The prince of power of the air Will never have a part in me As amateur creator I Can change the atmosphere around I use the chain of circumstance For any spirits to be bound

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I know that Jesus "The I AM" is the same today The prophet came to show the Life The Bride must have It on display The hour has come for Christ in us to be completely glorified I want the Spirit to be free To do the greater works in me!

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I am free… (Free) I am free… (Free, Free, I'm free) I am free… (Jesus has set me free) I am free… (Uniting you and me) We are free… (From chains and bondage) We are free… (From fears and worries) We are free… (From sins and transgressions) We are free… (Restore and set me free)

verse.name: C6
verse.lines: I am free, my new day has come (My new day has come) Now I can be who I truly am (I truly am, I truly am) I am free, covered by His blood! (Covered by His blood) All things are possible with God All things are possible with God

verse.name: C7
verse.lines: (I'm free… 3x) I am free, my new day has come (My new day has come) Now I can be who I truly am (I truly am, I truly am) I am free, covered by His blood! (Covered by His blood) All things are possible with God All things are possible with God
